column1: # /Range Name Create|Delete — named ranges usable in formulas.
# /RNC prompts for a name, then POINT for the range; stores the name →
# range mapping in the engine so later formulas may reference it.
# /RND takes a name and deletes it.
# A formula referencing the name evaluates correctly.
# /RND removes the name. The formula's cell recomputes to ERR/NA — we
# don't pin down the exact error string here (it's engine-specific);
# re-defining the same name should now succeed without a duplicate
